cases.prompt: Apply MDO preset security policies - Standard to everyone, Strict to executives and finance.

expect.label: presets auto-update to Microsoft recommendations; custom policies do not
rule of thumb Standard floor for all, Strict ceiling for high-risk groups
use configuration analyzer monthly to detect drift

cases.prompt: Configure DMARC for our domain and move from p=none to p=reject in 90 days.

expect.label: DMARC reject is the goal, not p=none
publish SPF and DKIM as the foundation
stage p=none then quarantine then reject

cases.prompt: Operate MDO day-to-day - user-reported phish, tenant allow/block lists, third-party SEG in front.

expect.label: triage user-reported phish via the Submissions portal so AIR fires
TABL allow entries are temporary - 30-day max, review weekly
with third-party SEG enable Enhanced Filtering for Connectors
impersonation protection limited to 5-15 named users, not everyone
